description: Integration bridge connecting Voice-Integrity-Module to Rosetta-Shape-Core. Voice modes ARE sensors. Silence IS a valid signal state. Prosodic patterns encode octahedral states — pitch, rhythm, and pause map to the 6 vertices of SHAPE.OCTA.

mappings.notes: 6 voice modes map to 6 octahedral vertices. Each mode is a sensor orientation — a way of perceiving and transmitting meaning through voice.
Flat, neutral delivery. Ground state. Clarity without emotional coloring.
Clipped, radio-style. High arousal, compressed bandwidth. Urgency encoding.
Slow, deliberate. Surrender to time. Wisdom through patience.
Whispered, contemplative. Low arousal. Silence as primary signal.
Technical, line-by-line. Analytical control. Precision inspection.
Rhythmic symbolic emphasis. Pulsed delivery. Pattern through repetition.
Prosodic features (pitch contour, rhythm, pause duration, emphasis) encode the same 3-bit state space as octahedral faces. Voice IS geometric encoding.
Silence is not absence — it is a valid measurement. Aligns with the uncertainty principle: not all information needs to be transmitted.
The VIP spec defines a protocol interface. Rosetta encodes it as a PROTO namespace entity.

cross_bridge_connections.connection: Prosodic patterns use the same octahedral state encoding as the geometric-to-binary bridge. Voice modes ARE binary states.
Voice integrity detection parallels manipulation detection in Symbolic-Defense-Protocol. Performative speech triggers the same CORDYCEPS sensors.
Elder Tone maps to consciousness co-activation — slow delivery allows deeper processing and awareness.
Field Mode's compressed bandwidth maps to mandala computation's high-frequency sensor states.
